title: auth_failed_if name reads as predicate, not action
description: Why: JmapChatClient::auth_failed_if(status) is named like a boolean predicate ('auth failed if X') but is actually a Result-returning action that returns Ok(()) on success. Callers skimming the code must read the body to understand the polarity. What: Rename to check_auth_status or require_non_auth_error. pub(crate) so no public API break.
